productDisplayName: Timberland Men's Chocorua Trail Brown Shoe
description: These Chocorua boots from timberland are great for exploring the great outdoors and other outdoor activities. The sturdy design incorporates premium material and wearer friendly features to give you greater comfort and grip. Team this with jeans and shirts for a great casual look.Upper Premium full-grain waterproof leather for comfort,durability and abrasion resistance Gore-Tex membrane provides breathable waterproof protection Padded tongue for greater comfort Padded collar provides comfort and prevents debris from entering Moisture wicking textile lining to keep the feet dry and comfortable Lace-ups with metallic eyelets for a snug Fit Brand logo seal on the side of heel Midsole Removable dual-density EVA footbed, peroforated for additional air circulation Outsole Classic rubber outsole with aggressive lugs on the heel and forefoot for greater traction Flex grooves for greater flexibilty of the feet Wash careUse the appropriate timberland leather shoe polish to keep your shoes cleanDo not use polish over canvas/woven areas
